name: Whole Wheat Sourdough
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1 cup water and 1/2 cup margarine at room temperature.
2. Add the yeast, whole wheat bread flour, unbleached bread flour, buttermilk powder, vital wheat gluten, lecithin, salt, wheat germ, ginger, olive oil, honey, and whole wheat sourdough to the mixing bowl.
3. Use a 3-cup flour model for portioning if necessary; add more flour if using whole wheat or rye flour as it doesn't rise as much.
4. Add vital wheat gluten and lecithin to aid elasticity and help the dough rise.
5. Follow the appliance's settings for Sweet Bread, then add 3/4 cup pecans at the beeps.
6. Experiment with adding raisins, oatmeal, or seeds if desired.
7. Share any beer starter when together, but keep using the whole wheat starter.
